subtasks.description: Query SQL warehouse for 2024 quarterly spend by publisher (Adobe, Microsoft) and product. Calculate Q1, Q2, Q3, Q4 totals and QoQ changes. Rank products within each publisher by Q4 spend.

plan.cost_rationale: This is a single SQL query requiring multi-quarter aggregation, windowing functions to compute QoQ changes, and ranking within publisher groups. A mid-tier sql_gen agent can handle the multiple CTEs and window functions (ROW_NUMBER/RANK over publisher and quarter partitions) needed to compute both QoQ deltas and product rankings in one call. No cross-source reconciliation or multi-tool orchestration is needed—all data comes from the SQL warehouse.

output.sql: WITH quarterly AS (SELECT publisher, product, fiscal_quarter, SUM(amount_usd) AS spend FROM consumption_facts WHERE event_date >= '2024-01-01' AND event_date < '2025-01-01' AND publisher IN ('Adobe','Microsoft') GROUP BY publisher, product, fiscal_quarter), pivoted AS (SELECT publisher, product, SUM(CASE WHEN fiscal_quarter=1 THEN spend END) AS q1_spend, SUM(CASE WHEN fiscal_quarter=2 THEN spend END) AS q2_spend, SUM(CASE WHEN fiscal_quarter=3 THEN spend END) AS q3_spend, SUM(CASE WHEN fiscal_quarter=4 THEN spend END) AS q4_spend FROM quarterly GROUP BY publisher, product) SELECT publisher, product, q1_spend, q2_spend, q3_spend, q4_spend, (q2_spend - q1_spend) AS qoq_q2_change, (q3_spend - q2_spend) AS qoq_q3_change, (q4_spend - q3_spend) AS qoq_q4_change, RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY publisher ORDER BY q4_spend DESC NULLS LAST) AS q4_rank FROM pivoted ORDER BY publisher, q4_rank
